/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/src/ConcreteFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/src/StateManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/src/View.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bomberman.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bomberman  ../logic/libbomberman_logic.a -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system
